settings.dialog_description: Configure writing behavior and layout for text rendering in the selected frame.
settings.desc_movement: Set the movement parameters that control writing speed and acceleration during letter strokes.
settings.desc_pen: Define the pen retraction height between strokes and the writing depth used to press into the surface.
settings.desc_spacing: Set the distances used for spacing between letters and for space characters in the written text.
settings.desc_offsets: Set the X and Y offset from the frame origin where text writing should begin.
